name: YoloLiv Verticam 1080p Vertical Live Streaming PTZ Camera with 12x Optical Zoom
description: If you want to add high-definition PTZ cameras to your already existing YoloBox setup, the YoloLiv Verticam 1080p Vertical Live Streaming PTZ Camera with 12x Optical Zoom can integrate seamlessly into your setup.

features.Key Features: 1080p60 USB-B/HDMI PTZ Camera | Captures Vertical Image for Social Media | For Live Streaming, Conferences, Events | Compatible with YoloBox | 12x Optical Zoom, 16x Digital Zoom | RS-232 Serial Control, 255 Presets | 1/2.8" CMOS Sensor, 72.5° Field of View
features.What's In The Box: YoloLiv Verticam 1080p Vertical Live Streaming PTZ Camera with 12x Optical Zoom
